candidates.row_label: Depreciation and write-downs of tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: This D&A line appears below gross profit alongside operating expense lines, not within or adjacent to the selected COGS bucket rows ('Operating Costs' / 'Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental'). It looks like operating overhead D&A rather than COGS-specific D&A, so adding it to COGS would risk misclassification.

This is a component of the broader depreciation summary and is located in the operating expense section below gross profit, not clearly tied to the selected COGS rows. It should not be added to COGS separately.
This appears to be a balancing row rather than a true operating D&A expense line for COGS. It should be excluded.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-related D&A row is shown outside the selected COGS bucket. Visible D&A rows appear in the operating overhead section after gross profit, so conservatively do not add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and write-downs of tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: This is an explicit separate D&A line in the operating expense section at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows ('Personnel Expenses' and 'Other Operating Expenses'). Because XSGA was built from components that explicitly excluded D&A, this summary D&A row should be added separately later. It is preferred over component rows to avoid double counting.
This appears to be a component under the broader summary row 'Depreciation and write-downs of tangible fixed assets'. Since a summary row exists, this component should not be selected separately.
This is labeled as a balancing value and not a substantive operating D&A line to add separately.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and write-downs of tangible fixed assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of Personnel Expenses and Other Operating Expenses, so the explicit separate D&A line should be added. Use the summary row only, not its components.
